an8.77:1.1:
1
There the Venerable Sāriputta addressed the bhikkhus: "Friends, bhikkhus!"
an8.77:1.2: "Friend," those bhikkhus replied. The Venerable Sāriputta said this:
an8.77:2.2:
"Friends, there are these eight kinds of persons found existing in the world. What eight?" .
.
an8.77:2.3: "These are the eight kinds of persons found existing in the world."
